text: I was walking on the beach when I saw a whale.
While we were driving, the sun rose over the coast.
It was raining when we arrived at the hotel.
While I was taking photos, I met a group of travelers.
Mark, what was the most memorable journey of your life?
Chile, two years ago. One morning, while we were driving along the coast, the sun rose over the mountains. The scenery was breathtaking.
That sounds amazing. What happened next?
While I was taking photos, I met a group of travelers from Brazil. We wandered through a fishing village together and bought some souvenirs.
Did anything go wrong on the trip?
Yes! On the way back, we got lost in the forest. It was getting dark, but we found the trail and watched an unforgettable sunset. What an adventure.
Last year, I traveled to the coast.
While we were driving, the scenery was breathtaking.
We got lost, but it was a real adventure.

It was the best trip of my life. Two years ago, I traveled to the south of Chile with two friends. On the first morning, the sun was rising over the mountains while we were driving along the coast. The scenery was breathtaking. Around noon, we stopped in a small fishing village and wandered through the narrow streets. Suddenly, while we were buying a souvenir, it started to rain very hard. We ran into a tiny cafe, and the owner told us wonderful stories about the region. It was raining all afternoon, but we did not mind at all. That evening, when the storm finally stopped, we watched an unforgettable sunset over the water.

Hi Ana Paula, it is Sarah! You will not believe my week. I am calling from Portugal. Yesterday was incredible. In the morning, while I was walking along the coast, I found a beautiful old lighthouse. The landscape was amazing. Then, around lunchtime, I got lost in the old town, but a kind woman helped me. In the afternoon, while I was doing some sightseeing near the river, it started to rain, so I bought a small souvenir and waited in a cafe. When the sky cleared, I watched the most beautiful sunset. It was a truly unforgettable day. Call me back soon. Bye!
Say where and when you traveled. Describe the scenery and what you were doing. Tell what happened suddenly. Explain how you felt in that moment. Say why the trip was unforgettable.
I was walking on the beach when I saw a whale.
While we were driving, the sun rose over the coast.
It started to rain while I was buying a souvenir.
When the storm stopped, we walked to the beach.
While I was doing some sightseeing, it started to rain.
They were wandering through the town when they got lost.
Last year, I traveled to the coast.
While we were driving, the scenery was breathtaking.
We got lost, but it was a real adventure.
